articles.description: Tony Hudgell, who lost both legs after his birth parents assaulted him, has fought to protect children.
articles.title: Tony Hudgell wins his campaign for new UK child cruelty register

articles.description: Can David and Victoria's youngest son escape the "nepo baby" label and find success with his band?
articles.title: Cruz Beckham launches music career, having fun amid family drama

articles.description: A skilled pianist nominated for five Grammy awards, Sedaka wrote hits through the 1950's and 60's.
articles.title: Neil Sedaka, singer of Breaking Up Is Hard To Do, dies at 86

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The parents of 14-year-old Ibrahima Seck say they were being harassed and bullied for years.
articles.title: 'Gang bullied us for years before our son Ibrahima Seck was killed'

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Huntley, who is serving a life sentence for murdering two schoolgirls, has significant head trauma, the BBC understands.
articles.title: Soham murderer Ian Huntley remains in hospital following prison attack

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The result - in a seat Labour has held for nearly 100 years - has renewed criticism of Sir Keir's leadership from Labour MPs.
articles.title: Keir Starmer vows to fight on despite Gorton and Denton by-election defeat to Greens

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: President Trump said he was not happy with Iran's stance, but had not yet decided whether to attack.
articles.title: Trump 'not thrilled' with Iran after latest talks on nuclear programme

articles.description: A group of low-fee paying private schools have challenged the government's removal of the VAT exemption.
articles.title: Private schools lose Court of Appeal challenge over VAT changes

articles.description: Kirk Jones says he initially thought a slur shouted during the ceremony was not broadcast.

articles.description: The party's historic win in Gorton and Denton by-election is clearest sign yet of changing political landscape.
articles.title: Green by-election victory shows insurgent parties are here to stay
